title: [ARCHIVED] Endgame Reborn Compat
description: Expands Endgame Reborn mod compatibility by overriding Endgame Reborn recipes to use vanilla variants of diamond and netherite gear
body:
### Endgame Reborn has been replaced by [End Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/end-reborn). With End Reborn, a compatibility addon datapack is not required for full compatibility with other mods' gear and recipes.

Expands Endgame Reborn's mod compatibility to work with mods that add gear that is upgraded from vanilla diamond or netherite by overriding [Endgame Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/endgame-reborn) recipes to use vanilla variants of diamond and netherite gear.

If you would like the full experience of the mod, you can always manually add compatibility between the modded diamond and netherite gear and the mod of your choice.

The primary compatibility issue is smithing recipes - all you need to do to add compat (with the modded versions of the vanilla items) yourself is to add the relevant smithing upgrade recipe - the armor id format follows endgame_reborn:netherite_armor_reborn_chestplate (swap out chestplate for other pieces, replace netherite with diamond to get diamond pieces) and the tools follow endgame_reborn:netherite_pickaxe_reborn (just swap out the pickaxe for the tool you need, the mod only creates new netherite tools, not diamond ones). 

If you would like to include this compatibility datapack as part of your modpack, I highly suggest checking out [Paxi](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxi), which allows you to put datapacks in config/paxi/datapacks to have them automatically force loaded at all times, like a mod.

You may include this in any Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. ~~Though Modrinth is better anyway.~~
